chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.147 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing (priority) case 1. For order on office objection as flag “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.911/2019 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 24.01.2025 Mr. Mirza Moiz Baig, Advocate for the Appellant. Mr. Arbaz Yar Khan, Advocate for the Respondent..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the appellant submits that since the suit, which was pending before the learned Single Judge, has been withdrawn by the Plaintiff, this appeal has become infructuous. In view of the above, the appeal is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
